## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss EA best practices with Giulia from Hypergrowth Partners, focusing on systems and workflows for efficient executive assistance.](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Regular alignment on expectations and workflows with executives is crucial (quarterly "wish list" reviews)](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Detailed, visual calendar management (color coding, emojis) tailored to executive preferences](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Proactive meeting prep and follow-up using AI tools (Granola, Brain) and manual review](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [Constant documentation and iteration of workflows for continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=3319.0)

## Topics

### Executive Alignment and Expectation Setting

  - [Quarterly "wish list" review with executives to align on priorities and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Establish communication schedules and preferences (e.g., async vs. sync)](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Set calendar management rules (e.g., buffer times, meeting types per time of day)](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Regular feedback loops to refine processes and ensure value delivery](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

### Calendar and Meeting Management

  - [Color-coding and emoji system for quick visual understanding of schedule](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Strategic scheduling based on executive preferences (e.g., back-to-back vs. buffers)](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Travel buffer indication using emojis (walking, car, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [VIP call handling: personalized options vs. calendar link sharing](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Weekly schedule review on Fridays for the upcoming week](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=2376.0)

### Meeting Preparation and Follow-up

  - [Comprehensive pre-meeting research (LinkedIn, company info, past interactions)](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [AI-assisted meeting summaries (Granola) combined with manual review for nuance](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Immediate action item extraction and follow-up email drafting post-meeting](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Use of CRM (ROMA Research) to track all interactions and maintain context](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### Communication Management

  - [Selective Slack access based on executive preference and privacy concerns](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=2632.0)
  - [Daily digest of important messages and threads for executive review](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Encourage team to tag EA in addition to executive for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=2925.0)
  - [Establish EA as the primary point of contact for executive matters](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=2956.0)

### Workflow Documentation and Iteration

  - [Document all workflows, including purpose, process, and expected outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=3319.0)
  - [Regular testing and refinement of workflows against initial hypotheses](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=3330.0)
  - [Maintain flexibility to adapt systems as needs and technologies change](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=3402.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Conduct kickoff meetings with executives to align on expectations and communication preferences](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=2363.0)
  - [Review and document current workflows, identifying areas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=2730.0)
  - [Explore AI tools (Granola, Brain) for meeting summaries and action item extraction](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Establish system for regular feedback and workflow iteration with executives](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=2363.0)
  - [Connect with Giulia on Slack for further questions and idea exchange](https://fathom.video/share/y5PPbrr8EUsrXkQwy94c9Tr6JdVA3Wh-?tab=summary&timestamp=3391.0)
